reviews.comment:
Las medialunas microscópicas.a. la empleada del turno mañana deberían darle un curso de buenos modales y atención al cliente.si puedo elegir diría que no vuelvo a desayunar allí.una pena!

(Translated by Google)
The croissants were microscopic. The employee on the morning shift should be given a course in good manners and customer service. If I had a choice, I'd say I'm never having breakfast there again. What a shame!
